summary: 8 guarded actions are staged from the live action plan around "Harden shared external feed validation"; trust 70%, regret 0.25.

approvalsRequired: Founder approval before any write action executes.
Each action must carry an explicit rollback plan in the queue artifact.
High-risk or task-board mutations require explicit scope-aware approval.
policy.rollbackExpectation: Every action must remain reversible through git or managed-file rollback notes.
policy.actorModel: Only the founder or an explicitly delegated operator may approve queued writes.
policy.dryRunExpectation: Every queued action should be previewable before execution whenever the target system supports it.
externalExecutionBlockers: pr-reviews is shadow: proxy/valid with trust 76% and quality 77%.
deploys is shadow: proxy/valid with trust 76% and quality 77%.
studio-hub is shadow: proxy/valid with trust 76% and quality 77%.
policy.authoritySummary: External execution remains blocked until signal trust, composite trust, and at least one high-risk adapter clear the current gates.

actions.title: Refresh intelligence around "Feed founder feedback directly into ranking and escalation policy"
actions.description: Recompute and persist runtime artifacts after reassessing the live top action "Feed founder feedback directly into ranking and escalation policy".
actions.approvalReason: This rewrites canonical runtime artifacts under ignis/output.
actions.rollbackPlan: Re-run the previous scoring cycle from git history or restore the prior artifact snapshots.
actions.commandHint: npm run build && tsx cli.ts founder .
actions.successMetric: Top actions and approval pressure adapt to founder behavior instead of just reporting it.

actions.title: Capture a timestamped evidence snapshot
actions.description: Persist a point-in-time evidence/founder snapshot for later comparison and regret analysis.
actions.approvalReason: This creates a new timestamped artifact under ignis/output/evidence-snapshots.
actions.rollbackPlan: Delete the timestamped snapshot file if it was created in error.
actions.successMetric: A fresh comparison point exists for the next score cycle.
actions.verificationCommand: Review ignis/output/evidence-snapshots for the new timestamped file.

actions.title: Stamp the current top contradiction
actions.description: Persist the highest-severity contradiction so founder surfaces and audits can reference the same stamp.
actions.approvalReason: This writes a new contradiction stamp that other surfaces may treat as current truth context.
actions.rollbackPlan: Restore the previous contradiction stamp or remove the generated stamp if it was noise.
actions.successMetric: Either intent criteria are too loose, or improvements aren't being tracked
actions.verificationCommand: Review ignis/output/contradiction-stamp.json for the active contradiction.

actions.title: Compile live playbook for "Feed founder feedback directly into ranking and escalation policy"
actions.description: Materialize the current ranked action into a structured execution playbook with verification, rollback, and evidence requirements.
actions.approvalReason: This writes a canonical action playbook that downstream execution surfaces may consume.
actions.rollbackPlan: Remove the generated playbook JSON if the action should not remain active.
actions.commandHint: Map explicit approve/defer/reject/edit feedback signals into recommendation weighting and queue escalation posture.
actions.successMetric: Top actions and approval pressure adapt to founder behavior instead of just reporting it.
actions.verificationCommand: Review ignis/output/action-playbooks/synth-feedback-policy.json for scope, verification, and rollback completeness.
actions.notes: Rank 1 · score 0.965 · category feedback · External execution gate is closed until trust/evidence improve; staging as artifacts.

skepticReview.counterargument: This action is well-supported but high-stakes. Confirm that the first step ("Route dashboard and hub-facing summaries through the operator command center so ...") is achievable with current resources before approving.
assumptions: Core assumptions appear well-grounded given current evidence depth and uncertainty.
preConditions: Verify success metric: "Dashboard, startup, founder, and hub-facing outputs all describe the same evidence gaps, trust shifts, and unlock posture." is measurable before proceeding.

adversaryFindings.summary: Supporting evidence averages 0% freshness. A refresh may overturn the recommendation.
Only 0 evidence node(s) back this recommendation across 2 ref(s); a single new contradicting signal could flip the ranking.

actions.title: Dry-run external execution lane for git
actions.description: Generate a dry-run contract for git using the current unlock state, evidence gaps, and rollback posture.
actions.approvalReason: This stages an adapter-backed external execution contract and should stay founder-gated even in dry-run mode.
actions.rollbackPlan: Delete the dry-run receipt if the execution lane should not remain active.
actions.commandHint: Validate git feed quality and produce a dry-run execution contract.
actions.successMetric: git has a reusable dry-run contract with verification and blocker notes.
actions.verificationCommand: Review ignis/output/external-dry-runs/git.json for verification, rollback, and unlock context.
actions.notes: Unlock stage dry-run; next step: Advance git by fixing missing required signals: commit_count.

actions.title: Stage managed task for "Turn leverage modeling into a regime-aware studio allocation engine"
actions.description: Insert a managed Now-bucket task for "Harden shared external feed validation".
actions.approvalReason: This mutates the Studio OS task board and therefore needs explicit approval.
actions.rollbackPlan: Remove the managed [IGNIS EXEC] line from TASK_BOARD.md if the action should not stay in the queue.
actions.successMetric: Signal coverage receipts explain why an adapter is trusted, invalid, or still shadow-only instead of showing generic feed status only.
actions.verificationCommand: Confirm the managed [IGNIS EXEC] item exists in the Now bucket.
